Class AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<T extends ExternalSolverRule>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp
Direct Known Subclasses:
IsabelleRuleApp, SMTRuleApp
@NullMarked public abstract class AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<T extends ExternalSolverRule> extends AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
The rule application that is used when a goal is closed by means of an external solver. So far it stores the rule that that has been used and a title containing some information for the user.

SMTRuleApp

  • Field Details

    • title

      protected final String title

    • successfulSolverName

      protected final String successfulSolverName

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp

      protected AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp(T rule, PosInOccurrence pio, ImmutableList<PosInOccurrence> unsatCore, String successfulSolverName, String title)
      Creates a new AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp,
      Parameters:
      rule - the ExternalSolverRule to apply
      pio - the position in the term to apply the rule to
      unsatCore - an unsat core consisting of the formulas that are needed to prove the goal (optional null)
      successfulSolverName - the name of the solver used to find the proof
      title - the title of this rule app

  • Method Details

      public String getTitle()
      Gets the title of this rule application
      Returns:

      Returns:
      copy of this with the new title
